abilities.description_es: Evita que el rival pueda debilitarle de un solo golpe.

highlighted_moves.effect_short_en: The user sets off an earthquake that strikes every Pokémon around it.
highlighted_moves.effect_short_es: Un terremoto que afecta a los Pokémon de alrededor en combate.

highlighted_moves.effect_short_en: The user attacks by slamming its body into the target. The higher the user's Defense stat, the greater the damage this move deals.
highlighted_moves.effect_short_es: El usuario usa el cuerpo para lanzar su ataque e infligir un daño directamente proporcional a su Defensa.

highlighted_moves.effect_short_en: Large boulders are hurled at opposing Pokémon to inflict damage. This may also make the opposing Pokémon flinch.
highlighted_moves.effect_short_es: Lanza grandes pedruscos. Puede amedrentar al objetivo.

highlighted_moves.effect_short_en: An attack move that inflicts double the damage if the user has been hurt by the foe in the same turn.
highlighted_moves.effect_short_es: Este ataque inflige el doble de daño a un objetivo que haya golpeado al usuario en ese mismo turno.

highlighted_moves.effect_short_en: The user slams into the target with its heavy body. The more the user outweighs the target, the greater the move's power.
highlighted_moves.effect_short_es: El usuario golpea con todo su cuerpo. Cuanto mayor sea su peso comparado con el del objetivo, más daño causará.

abilities.description_en: The Pokémon can check the foe’s held item.
abilities.description_es: El Pokémon puede ver el objeto que lleva el rival.

abilities.description_en: Passes through the opposing Pokémon's barrier, substitute, and the like and strikes.

abilities.description_en: Protects against friendly Pokémon's damaging moves.
abilities.description_es: Elude los ataques de aliados en batalla.

highlighted_moves.effect_short_en: Comets are summoned down from the sky onto the target. The recoil from this move harshly lowers the user’s Sp. Atk stat.
highlighted_moves.effect_short_es: Hace que grandes cometas caigan del cielo sobre el objetivo. Baja mucho el Ataque Especial del que lo usa.

highlighted_moves.effect_short_en: The user attacks by wrapping its opponent in a fierce wind that flies up into the sky. It may also confuse the target.
highlighted_moves.effect_short_es: Golpea al objetivo con un fuerte torbellino que envuelve al rival y puede confundirlo.

highlighted_moves.effect_short_en: The target is scorched with an intense blast of fire. This may also leave the target with a burn.
highlighted_moves.effect_short_es: Ataca con una gran ráfaga de fuego que puede causar quemaduras.

highlighted_moves.effect_short_en: After attacking the user switches out of battle to be replaced by another party Pokémon.
highlighted_moves.effect_short_es: Tras atacar, vuelve a toda prisa para dar paso a otro Pokémon del equipo.

highlighted_moves.effect_short_en: The user chomps hard on the target with its sharp front fangs. This cuts the target's HP in half.
highlighted_moves.effect_short_es: Finos colmillos que reducen a la mitad los PS del objetivo.

abilities.description_en: Strengthens grass moves to inflict 1.5× damage at 1/3 max HP or less.
abilities.description_es: Potencia los ataques de tipo Planta en un apuro.

abilities.description_en: Moves don't make contact.
abilities.description_es: Permite usar cualquier movimiento sin entrar en contacto con el rival.

highlighted_moves.effect_short_en: The user tucks in its wings and charges at a low altitude. This also damages the user quite a lot.

highlighted_moves.effect_short_en: The user handles a sharp leaf like a sword and cuts the target to inflict damage. This move has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit.

highlighted_moves.effect_short_en: The user attacks while simultaneously stitching the target's shadow to the ground to prevent the target from fleeing.
highlighted_moves.effect_short_es: Ataca al oponente y, al mismo tiempo, fija su sombra al terreno, impidiendo su huida.

highlighted_moves.effect_short_en: This move enables the user to attack first. This move fails if the target is not readying an attack.
highlighted_moves.effect_short_es: Permite atacar primero. Falla si el objetivo no está preparando ningún ataque.

highlighted_moves.effect_short_en: After attacking the user switches out of battle to be replaced by another party Pokémon.

highlighted_moves.effect_short_en: The target is struck with an icy-cold beam of energy. This may also leave the target frozen.

highlighted_moves.effect_short_en: The user attacks everything around it by swamping its surroundings with a giant wave.

highlighted_moves.effect_short_en: The user fights the target up close, inflicting damage without guarding itself. This also lowers the user's Defense and Sp. Def stats.
highlighted_moves.effect_short_es: Lucha abiertamente contra el objetivo sin protegerse. También reduce la Defensa y la Defensa Especial del usuario.

highlighted_moves.effect_short_en: The user sets off an earthquake that strikes every Pokémon around it.
highlighted_moves.effect_short_es: Un terremoto que afecta a los Pokémon de alrededor en combate.

highlighted_moves.effect_short_en: The user performs a tackle like a raging bull. This move's type depends on the user's form. It can also break barriers such as Light Screen and Reflect.
The user shrouds itself in electricity and smashes into its target. This also damages the user a little.
highlighted_moves.effect_short_es: Carga eléctrica muy potente que también hiere ligeramente a quien la usa.

highlighted_moves.effect_short_en: The user attacks by dropping onto the target with its full body weight. This may also leave the target with paralysis.
highlighted_moves.effect_short_es: Salta sobre el objetivo con todo su peso. Puede paralizar.

highlighted_moves.effect_short_es: Concentra su energía psíquica en la cabeza para golpear. Puede hacer que el objetivo retroceda.

highlighted_moves.effect_short_en: Large boulders are hurled at opposing Pokémon to inflict damage. This may also make the opposing Pokémon flinch.
highlighted_moves.effect_short_es: Lanza grandes pedruscos. Puede amedrentar al objetivo.

highlighted_moves.effect_short_en: The user slams into the target using a full-force blast of water. This may also lower the target's Defense stat.
highlighted_moves.effect_short_es: Ataca golpeando gracias a la fuerza del agua. También puede reducir la Defensa del objetivo.

abilities.description_en: Prevents accuracy from being lowered.
abilities.description_es: Evita que disminuya la Precisión.

abilities.description_en: Passes through the opposing Pokémon's barrier, substitute, and the like and strikes.
abilities.description_es: Ataca rodeando la barrera del rival.

abilities.description_en: Boosts the Sp. Atk stat sharply when a stat is lowered.
abilities.description_es: Aumenta su At. Esp. cuando disminuyen otras características.

highlighted_moves.effect_short_en: Two turns after this move is used, a hunk of psychic energy attacks the target.
highlighted_moves.effect_short_es: Concentra energía psíquica para golpear al objetivo dos turnos después.

highlighted_moves.effect_short_en: The target is hit with a strong telekinetic force to inflict damage. This may also lower the target’s Sp. Def stat.
highlighted_moves.effect_short_es: Fuerte ataque telequinético que puede bajar la Defensa Especial del objetivo.

highlighted_moves.effect_short_en: The user attacks the target with a strong electric blast. This may also leave the target with paralysis.
highlighted_moves.effect_short_es: Potente ataque eléctrico que puede paralizar al objetivo.

highlighted_moves.effect_short_en: The user attacks the target with its psychic power. When the ground is Psychic Terrain, this move's power is boosted and it damages all opposing Pokémon.
highlighted_moves.effect_short_es: El usuario ataca al objetivo con sus poderes psíquicos. Cuando se usa en conjunción con un campo psíquico, aumenta su potencia e inflige daño a todos los rivales.

highlighted_moves.effect_short_en: The user attacks by hurling a shadowy blob at the target. This may also lower the target’s Sp. Def stat.
highlighted_moves.effect_short_es: Lanza una bola oscura que puede bajar la Defensa Especial del objetivo.

ability.description_en: When it enters a battle, the Pokémon copies an opposing Pokémon's Ability.
ability.description_es: Copia la habilidad del rival.

abilities.description_en: Doubles Speed during rain.
abilities.description_es: Sube la Velocidad cuando hay lluvia.

abilities.description_en: Powers up moves of the same type as the Pokémon.
abilities.description_es: Potencia los movimientos del mismo tipo del Pokémon.

abilities.description_en: Moves can be used on the target regardless of its Abilities.
abilities.description_es: Usa movimientos sin que importen las habilidades del objetivo.

highlighted_moves.effect_short_en: The target is blasted by a huge volume of water launched under great pressure.
highlighted_moves.effect_short_es: Lanza una gran masa de agua a presión para atacar.

highlighted_moves.effect_short_en: The target is struck with an icy-cold beam of energy. This may also leave the target frozen.
highlighted_moves.effect_short_es: Rayo de hielo que puede llegar a congelar.

highlighted_moves.effect_short_en: The user attacks by shooting muddy water at opposing Pokémon. This may also lower their accuracy.
highlighted_moves.effect_short_es: Ataque con agua lodosa que puede bajar la Precisión del equipo rival.

highlighted_moves.effect_short_en: The user attacks everything around it by swamping its surroundings with a giant wave.
highlighted_moves.effect_short_es: Inunda el campo de batalla con una ola gigante. Fuera de batalla sirve para moverse sobre el agua.

highlighted_moves.effect_short_en: The user attacks by hurling a shadowy blob at the target. This may also lower the target’s Sp. Def stat.
highlighted_moves.effect_short_es: Lanza una bola oscura que puede bajar la Defensa Especial del objetivo.
